descriptionPt: Aplicação fullstack do zero: React no front, Node.js no back. Autenticação JWT + bcrypt, middlewares de proteção de rotas e PostgreSQL via Neon com Drizzle ORM.
descriptionEn: Fullstack app built from scratch: React on the front, Node.js on the back. JWT + bcrypt auth, route protection middleware, and PostgreSQL via Neon with Drizzle ORM.

descriptionPt: Plataforma de cursos da Vitis Souls. Front completo em React + Vite + TailwindCSS — code splitting, lazy loading, otimização de imagens com Sharp/WebP e SEO técnico. Construído do zero, da UI ao deploy.
descriptionEn: Course platform for Vitis Souls. Full frontend in React + Vite + TailwindCSS — code splitting, lazy loading, Sharp/WebP image optimization, and technical SEO. Built from scratch, from UI to deploy.
